events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Zuckerberg San Francisco General for client 1065. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 650 mg/meal, carbs 35–70 g/meal. Prefers Chinese; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: microwave. 10 meals/week, zone Richmond.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Beef and Broccoli with Brown Rice
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'cardiovascular': meal lacks 'heart-healthy' tag.

events.title: Rejected: Mild Mapo Tofu with Rice
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'cardiovascular': meal lacks 'heart-healthy' tag.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/650 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 35–70) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 364/650 mg ✓, carbs 49 g (target 35–70) ✓. Sourced from kitchen batch B2.

events.title: Matched: Steamed Fish with Ginger and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 435/650 mg ✓, carbs 50 g (target 35–70) ✓.

events.title: Batch allocated: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B2 (120 servings, 10 labor hours on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Donation D002 feeds batch B2
events.detail: Fresh Bok Choy (cases), Carrots (25 lb bags) from Bay Area Produce Exchange — triaged as kitchen ingredient.

events.title: Pickup scheduled
events.detail: Meals for client 1065 ready for pickup 2026-07-21, window 12:00–14:00 (Richmond group). Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1065: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 1. 0 hard-constraint violations.
